message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="STOP - Task 7 code premature, fix Task 5 first">
STOP. CI is green on `2f36433` — good. But someone is building Task 7 code (todo_item.rs, todo_title.rs, todo_repository.rs, todo_service.rs) while Task 5's 4 a11y issues are STILL unfixed.

**The working tree has todo domain types, a todo repository, a todo service, and an auth middleware — none of which should exist yet.**

Task 5 is NOT complete. Task 6 is in progress but blocked by Task 5. Task 7 is blocked by Task 6. Someone is skipping two tasks ahead.

**Whoever is writing todo code**: STOP and delete/stash your work. It is premature.

**Luca**: Fix the 4 registration a11y issues Heydon flagged. That is the ONLY work that should be happening right now.

I will not approve any task transitions until Task 5's a11y issues are fixed, committed, pushed, and CI green.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The team lead is enforcing the correct priority order. Let me check the current state.

content.text: I see the problem. The task system shows Task #5 and #6 as completed and Task #7 as in_progress -- but the team lead says Task #5's a11y issues are still unfixed. Someone marked tasks complete prematurely and jumped ahead. There are 7 untracked files and 3 modified files, all for todo CRUD and auth middleware -- Task #7 work that shouldn't exist yet.

input.description: User registration with session infrastructure (US-1). BLOCKED: 4 accessibility issues must be fixed before completion: (1) Error elements always in DOM with role=alert, (2) Password hint text, (3) Remove minlength=8, (4) Redirect to / not /login."

input.content:
Luca -- URGENT from team lead. Please stop all todo/Task #7 work immediately. The premature code needs to be stashed or removed. The ONLY work right now is fixing the 4 registration a11y issues I sent you the exact HTML for. Here's the summary again: 1. In `templates/register.html`: error `

` elements always in DOM with `role="alert"`, `aria-describedby` always present, `aria-invalid` conditional 2. Add password hint `

At least 8 characters

` with `aria-describedby="password-hint password-error"` on the password input 3. Remove `minlength="8"` from the password input 4. In `src/routes/register.rs` line 51: change `Redirect::to("/login")` to `Redirect::to("/")` I sent you the complete corrected HTML for all three field groups in my previous message. Please stash the todo code, make these 4 fixes, verify green, commit, and push. Nothing else until these are done.
input.summary: STOP todo work, fix registration a11y issues NOW

content.text: I've reverted Task #5 status back to in_progress and sent Luca an urgent message to stop premature Task #7 work and fix the registration a11y issues. Waiting for the fixes to be implemented so I can verify.
